hypothesis: If a diffusion-based generative model for composite material compositions incorporates non-negativity and sum-to-one physics constraints (PCDiff), then it will generate a significantly higher proportion of physically valid and practically fabricable compositions (higher Validityreg and Validityfab) while maintaining equal or better fidelity and diversity (Density/Coverage) than unconstrained CVAE and TabDDPM because the constraints steer sampling into the feasible composition simplex.
